nodes.title: Wan Text OneShot Cache Positif
widgets_values:
[This is a hyper-realistic video depicting a dramatic interaction between a tall female giantess muscular woman and a xsmall man. The giantess stands dominantly in the foreground, towering over the seated xsmall man. She is dressed in a black, long-sleeved dress that accentuates her muscular and powerful legs, which are prominently displayed as she points downward with her right index finger. Her left hand rests on her hip, emphasizing her confident and commanding posture. She has short, dark hair adorned with a green wreath, and her expression is calm and slightly condescending as she looks down at the xsmall man.The xsmall man, seated on a wooden chair with a high back, is naked with an erect penis, and his eyes are wide with a mixture of awe and fear as he gazes up at the giantess. His posture is submissive. he has short grey mature hair and beard.
In the background, the setting is dimly lit with a warm, yellowish glow from three lit candles on a small table to the right. The walls are dark and feature classical architectural elements, adding a sense of grandeur and formality to the scene. The overall composition emphasizes the size difference between the two characters and the giantess's dominant position over the xsmall man.]
(0-1 seconds: the giantess woman is pointing up with her finger, commanding him to touch and stroke his erect penis)
(1- seconds: the xsmall man is stroking his penis up and down multiple time and opening is mouth in ecstasy.)
